items.title: Google's Gemini co-lead Noam Shazeer joins OpenAI after two-year return stint
items.summary: Noam Shazeer, co-author of the landmark "Attention Is All You Need" paper and former co-lead of Google's Gemini models, is joining OpenAI. items.title: Gemma 4 12B: The Developer Guide
items.summary: The newly released Gemma 4 12B is a dense, multimodal model designed for high-performance local AI execution on consumer devices. By introducing a novel, encoder-free architecture, it bypasses traditional visual and audio encoders to feed multimodal data directly into the LLM backbone.

items.title: Yann LeCun warns AI labs like OpenAI and Anthropic face a "big bubble explosion"
items.summary: According to Yann LeCun, AI labs like OpenAI and Anthropic are heading for a "big bubble explosion": Their operations are effectively subsidized by investors, and operating costs aren't dropping fast enough, he says.
